auth.termsRequiredDesc: You must accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to create an account.
auth.signInDesc: Sign in to sync your game across devices
auth.signUpDesc: Create an account to save your progress in the cloud. You will keep your current progress.
auth.resetDesc: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
auth.verifyEmailReminder: Please check your email to verify your account. Also check your spam folder.
auth.noAccountSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccountSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.signedInDesc: Your game will now sync across devices.
auth.welcomeBonusDesc: You received {{amount}} Gold for signing up.
auth.signupWelcomeLog: You received {{amount}} Gold as a welcome bonus for creating an account!
auth.resetSentDesc: Check your email for a link to reset your password. Also look in spam folder.
auth.networkErrorDesc: Could not reach the sign-in server. If you're using NoScript or a content blocker, you may need to allow connections from this site.
auth.welcomeGold: Welcome! {{amount}} Gold added to your inventory.

inactivity.multiTabDesc: Your account was logged in from another device or browser. To protect your save data, only one active session is allowed at a time.
inactivity.timeoutDesc: You have been inactive for 15 minutes. To prevent you from missing game events, the game has been stopped. Your game has been saved.
inactivity.reloadHint: Please reload the page to continue playing.

restart.title: Start New Game?
restart.description: This will erase your current progress. Are you sure?
restart.warning: All your current progress will be lost if you start a new game.

versionUpdate.title: New Version Available
versionUpdate.description: A new version of the game is available. Your game has been saved. Please refresh to get the latest updates.

emailConfirmed.title: Email Confirmed
emailConfirmed.description: Your email has been verified successfully. Your account is now active and your progress will be saved to the cloud.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone. Your account, including your login credentials, purchases, leaderboard entries, and save games, will be deleted.
